title: Filipino Tinola with Sausage
description: A hearty and savory Filipino chicken soup made with ginger, onions, and sausage. Serve with steamed rice for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped ginger and sauté until fragrant.
Add the spring onions and cook until softened.
Add the pork sausage and cook until browned.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the fish sauce and season with black pepper.
